title: 4 Pack 80ml Salt Pepper Shaker, Salt Shaker with Adjustable Pour Holes, Spice Shaker, Glass Spice Jar with Shaker lids, Salt Cellar Salt Container Salt Dispenser for Seasoning Kitchen
features: ★ Aieraczy Salt and Pepper Seasoning ★ You will receive 4 pieces of salt shaker, which are enough to meet your daily needs, you can share them with your family and classmates. It's a necessary accessory for cooking enthusiasts or professional chefs.

★ High Quality ★ Our spice shaker is made of durable stainless steel cover and food-grade glass body, which is harder and more resistant to high temperatures. Clear body let's you see when they're ready to refill.

★ Adjustable & Keeps Freshness ★ The removable rotating lid have 4 different modes: Closed, open, big holes and small holes. With three different holes size, you can control the quantity of seasonings added to your meal according to your taste. The lid enables to maintain the freshness for a long time and to protect from dust & moisture.

★ Modern Design ★ There is a transparent window in the middle of the seasoning shaker, which you can see what is stored, which brings you a nice use experience; in addition, there are bumps on the bottom of the bottle, which can effectively avoid slipping and ensure seasoning safety.

★ Wide Range of Usages ★ Fill the salt dispenser with your favorite spices. Suitable for storing chili powder, salt, sugar, pepper, chicken essence, widely applied in kitchens, canteens, hotels, restaurants, cake shops, outdoor barbecue and so on.
description: Aieraczy 4 Pack Salt Pepper Shaker, 80ml Salt Shaker with Adjustable pour Holes, Spice shaker, Glass Spice Jar with Shaker lids, Salt Cellar Salt Container Salt Dispenser for Seasoning Kitchen
